title: Add 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with characters and scenes

requirements.text: Add 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house to the Haunted Houses section with tagline 'never talk back we just want to rip ur head off'

quotes: Yes add it to haunted house section
22 different scenes so never talk back we just want to rip ur head off

acceptanceCriteria: Haunted house appears in the Haunted Houses section alongside existing houses
Tagline 'never talk back we just want to rip ur head off' is displayed
House is accessible via detail page navigation

requirements.text: Add characters Blippy and Jiffy to 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with scene description 'out of breath and almost head' integrated into the 22 different scenes information system

quotes: I can only share 2 characters one name is Blippy and other one is Jiffy
out of breath and almsot head
Intergraded into haunted house information system

acceptanceCriteria: Blippy and Jiffy characters are mentioned in the haunted house description
Scene description 'out of breath and almost head' is incorporated into the scenes
Information about 22 different scenes is displayed in the haunted house detail page

requirements.text: Add 2030 investment announcement featuring new costume characters: Lola the Rabbit, Asher the Rabbit (her boyfriend), Max, and DD, plus all new princesses

quotes: In 2030 we are getting our biggest investment for the kids we are having more costume characters like Lola the Rabbit and her boyfriend Asher the rabbit and getting all new princesses
a new character called Max and DD

acceptanceCriteria: 2030 investment announcement is visible on the site
All four new costume characters are listed: Lola the Rabbit, Asher the Rabbit, Max, and DD
Princesses section is included in the announcement
Content clearly indicates this is for 2030

requirements.text: Add audition information for 2030 costume characters emphasizing vocal skills with note that 'some sing some don't'

quotes: if u want to audition just be vocal and some sing some don't

acceptanceCriteria: Audition section mentions vocal requirements for costume character roles
Clarification that 'some sing some don't' is included
Information is associated with the 2030 characters announcement

constraints: Do not modify existing haunted house entries (Open Ice Tomb, Wax Works, Terror Hell Hole, Clown Town, Asylum Hell, Schoolhouse Break and Blackout)
Preserve existing audition structure and forms for scare actors and dancers
nonGoals: Building Room Assignments page for Secret Tunnels (Phase 2)
Creating interactive tunnel map with clickable floor plan (Phase 2)
Adding auditions schedules for makeup artists and SFX artists (Phase 2)

required: Haunted house exterior photo showing toy-themed horror attraction with prominent entrance (toys-come-to-play-exterior.dim_1200x600.png)
Interior scene showing Blippy character in creepy toy setting with dark atmospheric lighting (blippy-scene.dim_800x600.png)
Interior scene showing Jiffy character in menacing pose among scattered toys (jiffy-scene.dim_800x600.png)
Promotional banner showing Lola the Rabbit and Asher the Rabbit costume characters in friendly pose (lola-asher-rabbits.dim_1000x600.png)
Character illustration of Max costume character in vibrant family-friendly style (max-character.dim_600x800.png)
Character illustration of DD costume character in colorful cheerful design (dd-character.dim_600x800.png)
